title: lastrea shepherdii
intro: Lastrea shepherdii, also known as the Shepherd's Spleen Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lastrea shepherdii include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its role in reducing fever and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
